name: 安装并配置 RDP 桌面（mstsc 3389）
description: 在 QwenPaw Docker 容器中安装 xrdp、x11vnc、xfce4 等组件，把现有 Xvfb/xfce4 桌面通过 RDP 暴露出来。配置完成后，可用 Windows 远程桌面连接容器 3389 端口，实时查看 QwenPaw/browser-use 的桌面操作。注意：Docker 启动时仍需要映射 3389 端口，例如 -p 3389:3389 或使用 host 网络。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RDP_USER="{{rdp_user}}"
RDP_PASS="{{rdp_password}}"
RDP_PORT="{{rdp_port}}"
VNC_PORT="{{vnc_port}}"
XFCE_DISPLAY="{{xfce_display}}"

if [ -z "$RDP_USER" ] || [ -z "$RDP_PASS" ]; then
  echo "rdp_user and rdp_password are required."
  exit 1
fi

apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq --no-install-recommends \
  supervisor \
  apt-utils \
  xrdp \
  x11vnc \
  xfce4 \
  dbus-x11


# Create/login user used by xrdp authentication.
if [ "$RDP_USER" = "root" ]; then
  echo "root:$RDP_PASS" | chpasswd
  cat > "/root/.xsession" <<'XSESSION'
#!/bin/sh
export XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP=XFCE
export XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11
exec startxfce4
XSESSION
  chmod +x "/root/.xsession"
else
  if ! id "$RDP_USER" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    useradd -m -s /bin/bash "$RDP_USER"
  else
    usermod -d "/home/$RDP_USER" -s /bin/bash "$RDP_USER" || true
  fi
  echo "$RDP_USER:$RDP_PASS" | chpasswd
  # If the container later falls back to an Xorg/xrdp session, make XFCE the session.
  cat > "/home/$RDP_USER/.xsession" <<'XSESSION'
#!/bin/sh
export XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP=XFCE
export XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11
exec startxfce4
XSESSION
  chmod +x "/home/$RDP_USER/.xsession"
  chown -R "$RDP_USER:$RDP_USER" "/home/$RDP_USER"
fi




# xrdp login screen: expose only the existing Xvfb/xfce4 desktop via x11vnc.
python3 - <<PY
from pathlib import Path
import re

rdp_port = "$RDP_PORT"
vnc_port = "$VNC_PORT"
path = Path("/etc/xrdp/xrdp.ini")
text = path.read_text()

# Set RDP listen port.
text = re.sub(r"(?m)^port\s*=.*", f"port={rdp_port}", text, count=1)

# Comment out the default Xorg backend so users usually only see the shared desktop option.
def comment_section(name: str, content: str) -> str:
    pattern = re.compile(rf"(?ms)^\[{re.escape(name)}\].*?(?=^\[|\Z)")
    def repl(match: re.Match) -> str:
        return "\n".join((";" + line) if line.strip() else line for line in match.group(0).splitlines())
    if pattern.search(content):
        return pattern.sub(repl, content)
    return content

text = comment_section("Xorg", text)

xvnc = f"""[Xvnc]
name=Existing XFCE Desktop (Xvfb :1)
lib=libvnc.so
ip=127.0.0.1
port={vnc_port}
code=20
"""
text = re.sub(r"(?ms)^\[Xvnc\].*?(?=^\[|\Z)", xvnc, text)
if "[Xvnc]" not in text:
    text += "\n" + xvnc

path.write_text(text)
PY

# Share the existing Xvfb display (:1 by default) to localhost only; xrdp connects to it locally.
cat >> /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf.template <<CONF

[program:x11vnc]
command=/bin/sh -c 'export DISPLAY="${XFCE_DISPLAY}"; XSOCK="/tmp/.X11-unix/X\${DISPLAY#:}"; for i in \$(seq 1 200); do [ -S "\$XSOCK" ] && break; sleep 0.1; done; exec x11vnc -display "\$DISPLAY" -forever -shared -rfbport ${VNC_PORT} -listen 127.0.0.1 -nopw'
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=20
stopasgroup=true
killasgroup=true
stderr_logfile=/var/log/x11vnc.err.log
stdout_logfile=/var/log/x11vnc.out.log

[program:xrdp-sesman]
command=/usr/sbin/xrdp-sesman -n
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=21
stopasgroup=true
killasgroup=true
stderr_logfile=/var/log/xrdp-sesman.err.log
stdout_logfile=/var/log/xrdp-sesman.out.log

[program:xrdp]
command=/usr/sbin/xrdp -n
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=22
stopasgroup=true
killasgroup=true
stderr_logfile=/var/log/xrdp.err.log
stdout_logfile=/var/log/xrdp.out.log
CONF

# Allow local users to attach to the shared X display if any helper process needs it.
if command -v xhost >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "${DISPLAY:-}" ]; then
  xhost +SI:localuser:"$RDP_USER" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi

# Reload supervisord if it is already running.
if command -v supervisorctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  supervisorctl reread >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  supervisorctl update >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  supervisorctl start x11vnc >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  supervisorctl start xrdp-sesman >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  supervisorctl start xrdp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi

# If supervisord is not running yet, the next container start will pick up the new config.
echo "RDP desktop setup complete."
echo "  RDP user: $RDP_USER"
echo "  RDP port: $RDP_PORT"
echo "  x11vnc port: $VNC_PORT (localhost only)"
echo "  Shared X display: $XFCE_DISPLAY"
echo ""
echo "From Windows: mstsc -> ${RDP_HOST:-<container-ip-or-host>}:$RDP_PORT"
echo "Make sure Docker publishes the RDP port, for example: docker run -p 3389:3389 ..."

vnc_port.label: 本地 x11vnc 端口（仅 localhost）
